lab.title: Lab 01 - Manage Microsoft Entra ID Identities

steps.title: Sign in to Azure Portal
steps.instruction: Sign in to the Azure portal - https://portal.azure.com. To proceed to the portal, select Cancel on the Welcome to Azure splash screen.
steps.aiResponse:
I'm unable to execute this step. **PowerShell 6+ (pwsh.exe) is not installed** on this system, which means I cannot:

- Launch a browser via Playwright MCP
- Navigate to portal.azure.com
- Take screenshots or interact with the Azure portal

### Resolution Options

1. **Install PowerShell 6+** — Download from https://aka.ms/powershell and restart your terminal
2. **Use the lab-drift CLI directly** from a working terminal:
   ```bash
   npm run dev -- scan "https://microsoftlearning.github.io/AZ-104-MicrosoftAzureAdministrator/Instructions/Labs/LAB_01-Manage_Entra_ID_Identities.html"
   ```

